title: Pillowy Roasted Japanese Chicken Noodles
description: A post-workout Japanese dish featuring roasted chicken, pillowy noodles, and a Mediterranean-friendly lemon glaze, perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, honey, garlic, and lemon juice to make the glaze.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and coat with the glaze, then let it marinate for 10 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
While the chicken is cooking, cook the Japanese noodles according to the package instructions.
In a small bowl, whisk together sesame oil and lemon juice to make the dressing.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, sliced chicken, and chopped green onions, then drizzle with the dressing.
Toss everything together to combine and serve hot.
